title: Late Invoice Follow-Up Sequence for Freelancers
description: Freelancers chasing unpaid invoices get 6 escalating, professionally worded follow-up message templates that recover payment without burning the client relationship.
gumroad_description:
You finished the work, sent the invoice, and now you're being ghosted — and every day you wait costs you money and momentum.

Who this is for

  • Freelance designers, developers, and writers with at least one outstanding invoice sitting past due right now
  • Solo consultants who avoid follow-up because they don't know what to say without sounding desperate or aggressive
  • Agency owners who want a repeatable system their team can use instead of winging it every time

What's inside

  • 6 escalating follow-up templates — from polite nudge to final notice — so you always know what comes next
  • 23 copy-ready message variations covering email, SMS, and direct message formats
  • Markdown and JSON files so you can drop these straight into your tools or CRM
  • Usage notes explaining when to send each message and what tone to strike

Getting paid shouldn't require a law degree or a confrontation — it just requires the right words at the right time. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com.
